No Poverty.reason: Course discusses 'socioeconomic rights' and 'defending human rights in the developing world,' directly linking to poverty reduction and economic resource access for the vulnerable.
evidence: defending human rights in the developing world

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly discusses 'global civil society,' 'transnational advocacy,' and 'international cooperation,' which are key components of global partnerships for development.
